productName: Const HRG EFCT 1:1 Watermelon Lime + Ashwagandha (100 CBN) 10 Pack (I)
description: A boutique-style tart, crisp lime gummy with a soft bounce, bright aroma, and a polished sugar finish worthy of a European confection counter. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. With added ashwagandha to help ease stress.
